data.name: hero_subtitle
data.value: Book your cleaning appointment online in minutes. We handle vehicles, offices, stairwells, boats, and more — done right, done professionally.

data.name: section_why_subtitle
data.value: We combine professional-grade equipment, trained staff, and a streamlined booking system to deliver results you can count on.

data.name: feature_equipment_desc
data.value: We use industry-grade tools and eco-friendly products for a deep, lasting clean on every job.

data.name: feature_ontime_desc
data.value: Your time is valuable. We show up when scheduled and complete jobs efficiently without cutting corners.

data.name: feature_easybook_desc
data.value: Book your slot in minutes, pick your service, choose a time — no phone calls required.

data.name: feature_guarantee_desc
data.value: Not happy with the result? We'll come back and make it right. Your satisfaction is our priority.

data.name: footer_description
data.value: Professional cleaning services for individuals. Vehicle washing, office and stairwell cleaning, boats, and more — done right, every time.

data.name: empty_no_public_services
data.value: No services available at the moment.

data.name: msg_failed_bookings_load
data.value: Failed to load bookings. Please try again.

data.name: msg_could_not_connect
data.value: Could not connect to server. Please try again.

data.name: msg_add_service_first
data.value: Please add at least one service.

data.name: content_book_form_desc
data.value: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you with a quote.

data.name: content_book_pick_services
data.value: Pick services from the dropdown — they'll appear above

data.name: content_portal_login_desc
data.value: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link to sign in.

data.name: content_portal_testing_note
data.value: For testing, the magic link will appear in the server console.

data.name: content_admin_login_subtitle
data.value: Enter your credentials to access the admin panel.

data.name: content_no_services_selected
data.value: No services selected yet. Pick from the dropdown.

data.name: admin_login_subtitle
data.value: Enter your credentials to access the admin panel.

data.name: error_access_denied
data.value: Access denied. You do not have permission.

data.name: error_unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.

data.name: error_db_error
data.value: A database error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: error_no_permission
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: error_expired_token
data.value: This link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.

data.name: err_catalog_required
data.value: Catalog code and name are required.

data.name: err_invalid_service_type
data.value: Service type must be one of: Standard, PerHour, PerItem.

data.name: err_payment_amount_zero
data.value: Payment amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: err_slot_full
data.value: The {0}:00 slot on {1} is fully booked.

data.name: err_quantity_required
data.value: Quantity must be greater than zero.

data.name: err_password_length
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: err_cannot_edit_request
data.value: Cannot edit a request with status '{0}'.

data.name: err_sop_already_assigned
data.value: This SOP template is already assigned.

data.name: empty_no_slots_date
data.value: No slots available for this date.

data.name: modal_end_series_warning
data.value: Are you sure you want to end this series?

data.name: modal_make_recurring_desc
data.value: Configure the recurring schedule for this booking.

data.name: empty_no_requirements
data.value: No inventory requirements for this service.

data.name: err_quantity_needed_required
data.value: Quantity needed must be greater than zero.

data.name: NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: First and last name are required.

data.name: PASSWORD_COMPLEXITY
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit.

data.name: USERNAME_GENERATION_FAILED
data.value: Could not generate a unique username.

data.name: SLOT_CLOSED
data.value: This time slot is closed and not available for booking.

data.name: SLOT_FULLY_BOOKED
data.value: This time slot is fully booked.

data.name: CLIENT_NOT_FOUND_INACTIVE
data.value: Client was not found or is inactive.

data.name: SITE_NOT_FOUND_INACTIVE
data.value: Site does not belong to this client or is inactive.

data.name: BOOKING_CREATE_LOAD_FAILED
data.value: Booking was created but could not be loaded. Please refresh.

data.name: INVALID_BOOKING_FOR_ASSIGN
data.value: Cannot assign employees to a booking with this status.

data.name: EMPLOYEE_ALREADY_ASSIGNED
data.value: This employee is already assigned to this booking.

data.name: INVALID_BOOKING_FOR_REMOVE
data.value: Cannot remove an assignment from a booking with this status.

data.name: EMPLOYEE_NOT_ASSIGNED
data.value: This employee is not assigned to this booking.

data.name: INVOICE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: An invoice has already been generated for this booking.

data.name: CATALOG_SERVICE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Service was not found in the catalog.

data.name: CANNOT_REMOVE_AFTER_INVOICE
data.value: Cannot remove services after an invoice has been generated.

data.name: SERVICE_NOT_ON_BOOKING
data.value: Service was not found on this booking.

data.name: SERVICE_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one service must be selected.

data.name: INVALID_REQUEST_STATUS
data.value: Cannot edit a request with this status.

data.name: CANNOT_SEND_CUSTOMER
data.value: Cannot send this request to the customer.

data.name: REQUEST_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: This request is not available for action.

data.name: CANNOT_CONFIRM_STATUS
data.value: Cannot confirm a request with this status.

data.name: CANNOT_CONVERT_STATUS
data.value: Cannot convert a request with this status.

data.name: CANNOT_CONVERT_NO_SERVICES
data.value: Cannot convert a request with no services.

data.name: CLIENT_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Client type must be Person or Business.

data.name: PRIMARY_CONTACT_PHONE_REQUIRED
data.value: Primary contact phone number is required.

data.name: ACTIVE_CONTACT_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one active contact with a name and phone number is required.

data.name: CONTACT_VALIDATION_FAILED
data.value: Contact validation failed. Please check your entries.

data.name: CANNOT_DEACTIVATE_ALL_CONTACTS
data.value: At least one active contact is required. You cannot deactivate all contacts.

data.name: DATE_OVERRIDE_PAST
data.value: Date overrides cannot be created for past dates.

data.name: CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE
data.value: You cannot change your own role.

data.name: CANNOT_DEACTIVATE_SELF
data.value: You cannot deactivate your own account.

data.name: INVENTORY_IN_USE
data.value: Cannot delete this item because it is referenced by service requirements.

data.name: BOOKING_NOT_COMPLETED
data.value: Only completed bookings can generate an invoice.

data.name: BOOKING_ALREADY_INVOICED
data.value: Booking is already linked to an invoice.

data.name: BOOKING_NOT_COMPLETED_RECURRING
data.value: Only completed bookings can be used as a recurring source.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_EXISTS
data.value: A role with this name already exists.

data.name: ROLE_PROTECTED
data.value: This role is protected and cannot be modified or deleted.

data.name: ROLE_HAS_ASSIGNED_USERS
data.value: Users are assigned to this role. Reassign them before deleting.

data.name: SCHEDULE_ENTRY_EXISTS
data.value: A schedule entry for this day already exists.

data.name: INVENTORY_ALREADY_LINKED
data.value: This inventory item is already linked to this service.

data.name: QUANTITY_NEEDED_POSITIVE
data.value: Quantity needed must be greater than zero.

data.name: SOP_NOT_FOUND_INACTIVE
data.value: SOP template was not found or is inactive.

data.name: SOP_ALREADY_ASSIGNED
data.value: This SOP template is already assigned to the booking.

data.name: EXPIRED_INVALID_LINK
data.value: This link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.

data.name: INVALID_LINK
data.value: This link is invalid. Please request a new one.
